title: Comuter's Extra Tools
description: Comuter's extra tools is a mod with, you guessed it, extra tools!
body:
![Amethyst Pickaxe // Comuter's Extra Tools logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ca1df97657236f72a9e49d1f4c34f0e32ab047d.png)
# Comuter's Extra Tools!
## Announcement
> CET is currently being revamped, next update might take a while
## Introduction
Hey there! Comuter's Extra Tools is all about making tools from the remaining ores that don't have tools assigned to them, for example the emerald. You can now craft emerald swords, redstone pickaxes and WAY WAY MORE!
## Key Features
- NEW PICKAXE TYPES
- NEW INGOTS
- NEW ORES (planned)
- NEW CRAFTING RECIPES
- NEW ARMOR TYPES
- NEW ADVANCEMENTS
## Why YOU might want this!
Stop being annoyed about some ores not being able to be converted to tools. Comuter's Extra Tools is here to save your day! Now you can make tools from the remaining ores that cant be crafted into tools (wait, that doesn't make sense). Do you want new gear avaliable in your world/server? Yeah, you know what to download. Comuter's Extra Tools!
## You might need this!
I'd recommend downloading [Just Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei), as there might be some confusing crafting recipes inside of the mod. Otherwise, the mod works just as mentioned above /shrug.
